title: AI driven platform for finance assessment
shortDescription: Intelligent trade finance automation. Faster decisions, consistent compliance, full portfolio visibility. From commodities, to green technologies.
longDescription:
As green compliance requirements intensify, banks face an unsustainable bottleneck: thousands of transactions assessed against evolving environmental criteria, handled manually by overstretched teams. This platform brings AI-powered automation to the full lifecycle of green trade finance — from document ingestion and transaction triage through eligibility classification, CO2 impact quantification, and compliance verification. Every decision is auditable, every metric traceable to source, and a real-time pipeline dashboard delivers instant portfolio visibility by geography, risk tier, and approval status.

The vision: shift expert attention from data entry to judgment, deliver consistent (green) loan assessments at volume, and provide banks a modern foundation for the next generation of trade finance.
